title: Primary and secondary amines
summary: 9701 A Level amines — basicity, alkylation, and acylation.
learningObjectives: Draw primary and secondary amine structures.

simpleExplanation.title: Nitrogen nucleophiles
simpleExplanation.summary: Amines have a lone pair on nitrogen making them bases and nucleophiles in substitution and acylation.
steps: Alkyl groups increase basicity vs NH₃.
Excess halogenoalkane gives mixture of amines.

sections.content: **Amines** (34.1) contrast **19.1 primary amines AS** with **2° chemistry** and **amide formation** at A Level.
